nasb.text: Therefore it shall come about when the Lord your God has given you rest from all your surrounding enemies, in the land which the Lord your God gives you as an inheritance to possess, you shall blot out the memory of Amalek from under heaven; you must not forget.

esv.text: Therefore when the Lord your God has given you rest from all your enemies around you, in the land that the Lord your God is giving you for an inheritance to possess, you shall blot out the memory of Amalek from under heaven; you shall not forget.

cnv.text: 所以耶和華你的　神使你脫離四圍所有的仇敵，在耶和華你的　神賜給你作產業的地上，得享太平的時候，你務要把亞瑪力這名號從天下塗抹，不可忘記。”

ccb.text: 所以，当你们的上帝耶和华赐给你们那片土地作产业、使你们四境安宁时，要灭绝亚玛力人，抹去世人对他们的记忆。你们要切记！
